title: quercus lungmaiensis
intro: Quercus lungmaiensis, also known as the Lungmai oak, is a species of evergreen tree native to northern Vietnam. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Quercus lungmaiensis include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce inflammation, and protect against oxidative stress. Traditionally, the plant has been used to prepare herbal infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used to treat various ailments, including fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
